rulings.Case Title: IN RE: QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion; Motion For Claim And Distribution Of Excess Surplus Proceeds On Deposit With The Court
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 30, 2024 line 1. RESPONDENT TAN HOANG Notice Of Motion; Motion For Claim And Distribution Of Excess Surplus Proceeds On Deposit With The Court Hearing Required for claimant to present evidence that claimant is the same person as the former trustor, e.g. an original of the driver's license containing the property address; original letters/communications from governmental entities address to the property (IRS, Franchise Tax Board, City of San Francisco); tax transcripts showing property address, etc =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: FONGKOK ZHOU ET AL VS. MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 30, 2024 line 2. PLAINTIFF FONGKOK ZHOU, SHAO ZHOU, JACK ZHOU Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend Complaint is DENIED. The motion for leave to amend as requested is denied. New theories of a possible amendment advanced in reply are not considered on this motion as not timely presented to the Court; and providing no opportunity to the Defendant to respond. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
